title: Not every image can be pulled inside container
body:
**Description**

I am running quay.io/buildah/stable with vfs storage driver, as root user. Container is sunning on Kubernetes, K3s in particular.

Pulling some images work fine, like alpine:

```
sh-5.0# buildah pull docker.io/alpine
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob df20fa9351a1 done  
Copying config a24bb40132 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
a24bb4013296f61e89ba57005a7b3e52274d8edd3ae2077d04395f806b63d83e
```

Some others throw permission error:

```
sh-5.0# buildah pull docker.io/openjdk
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2778faef3420 done  
Copying blob bce8f778fef0 done  
Copying blob 945a8b67ac57 done  
Copying config 0cd6de5fdb done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
ERRO Error while applying layer: ApplyLayer exit status 1 stdout:  stderr: operation not permitted 

```


```
sh-5.0# buildah info
{
    "host": {
        "CgroupVersion": "v1",
        "Distribution": {
            "distribution": "fedora",
            "version": "32"
        },
        "MemTotal": 3721777152,
        "MenFree": 1905565696,
        "OCIRuntime": "runc",
        "SwapFree": 0,
        "SwapTotal": 0,
        "arch": "amd64",
        "cpus": 2,
        "hostname": "runner-6aaskeaz-project-20381742-concurrent-0676zf",
        "kernel": "3.10.0-1127.el7.x86_64",
        "os": "linux",
        "rootless": true,
        "uptime": "91h 45m 12.44s (Approximately 3.79 days)"
    },
    "store": {
        "ContainerStore": {
            "number": 0
        },
        "GraphDriverName": "vfs",
        "GraphOptions": [
            "vfs.imagestore=/var/lib/shared"
        ],
        "GraphRoot": "/var/lib/containers/storage",
        "GraphStatus": {},
        "ImageStore": {
            "number": 1
        },
        "RunRoot": "/var/run/containers/storage"
    }
}
```

comments.body:
Any idea what is in this layer?

Is this SELinux blocking the layer?  Is it attempting to create a device node?  Perhaps a setfcap file?

What privileges does the container have?

I don’t see anything like this: https://github.com/docker-library/openjdk/blob/master/15/jdk/alpine3.12/Dockerfile but may be I am missing something. Just alpine image works, and these ones are based on alpine
I checked other Dockerfiles in openjdk repo and could not find anything specific
Not really, sorry. I just used another base image, didn't have much time left to investigate further.
